repo.name: My Cool Apps Collection
repo.description: A collection of my cool Android applications! All APKs are official releases from GitHub repositories, automatically updated daily.

apps.description:
Flow Controller is a two-component remote control system that lets you control 
your computer from anywhere in your home network.

Features:
• Gesture Control - Swipe for arrow keys, tap for Enter, double-tap for ESC
• System Keyboard - Use your favorite mobile keyboard for instant text input
• Volume Control - Dedicated buttons with real-time percentage display
• Wake-on-LAN - Automatically wake sleeping computers with any gesture
• Live Monitoring - Real-time connection status with ping measurement
• High Performance - Instant response, 10+ gestures per second
• Secure - Token-based authentication with automatic MAC discovery

Perfect for media centers, presentations, or casual PC control from your couch.
apps.name: Flow Controller
apps.summary: Control your Windows/Linux PC remotely from your Android phone
